name: Charge State Economy
description: Speed >= 300 HU/s while grounded determines threat. Anything below is vulnerable.

name: Prey Carrier Paradigm
description: Carrier max speed is 75% of empty-handed max. The carrier can never outrun a charging defender in a straight line.

name: Instant Contact Possession
description: Walking into a loose ball instantly assigns possession. No keypresses, delays, or confirmation logic permitted.

name: Throw Committment
description: Charging up a throw explicitly zeros all forward/backward/sideways movement capabilities (0 HU/s). Punishes indecision or mistimed passes.

name: Head-On Velocity Resolution
description: When two charging players collide, instantaneous collision velocity determines the winner. Margins are absolute (e.g., 358 vs 357 HU/s).

name: Air Vulnerability
description: Jumping or airborne states strip charge flag instantly. Air players cannot tackle and are defeated by grounded chargers.

name: Obstacle Penalty
description: Contact with map geometry zeroes speed immediately. Fumbles are caused only by knockdowns, not wall hits.
